---
title: "Brain Transcriptomics"
description: "Multi-region brain RNA-seq differential expression using DESeq2
  with CYP2C19 as the primary continuous covariate across up to 7 brain regions."
date: 2026-05-01
image: "/images/Phase 3.png"
---

## Overview

Differential gene expression analysis on SMRI Stanley RNA-seq data (up to 7
brain regions) using CYP2C19 activity score as the primary continuous covariate
in DESeq2. CYP2D6 run as a separate exploratory model.

**Timeline:** Weeks 5–8

## Methods

*Coming soon.*

## Deliverables

*Coming soon.*

## Results

*Coming soon.*
